titleStmt.title: SII 31.171: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 171. (A.R. No. B 252 of 1936.) KUMĀRADĒVAM, NIDADAVOLE TALUK, WEST GODAVARI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar in the mukhamaṇḍapa of the Venkaṭēśvarasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1160, (Viḷaṁbi), Kārtīka, Mahādvādasi, Bṛihaspativāra (Thursday) corresponding to 1238 A.D. October, 21, f.d.t. °14.
Records an agreement (oḍam baṟuka s.a oḍaṁbaḍi) made by the merchant guilds (nakaram) to offer tax (suṁkkamu) as a gift to the god Ishṭakāmeśvaradeva at Gajjaram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śakavaṣaṁbulu 1160 dagunēṁṭṭi kā¨rttika śudda mahādvā
daśiyu bre(bṛ)haspativāramunāṁḍu śrīmadgajjaramuna Iṣṭakāmī
sva(śva)raśrīmahādēvaraku gajjaramuna nakaramaśēṣamuṁ gūḍi su
ṁkkamu Ōḍaṁbaṟaka Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasdāyigā niccitimi . yī dha¨rmmu
vu na kevvarēni viṣnumu sēsinavāru gaṁgakaṟutaṁ vēyi nēnūṟu
gavilalaṁ boḍicinavāru . peddakoḍku kapālamunaṁ guḍicinavāru . vā
raṇāsi vraccinavāru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyōharēti vasuṁtharā ṣa
ṣṭhi¨rvva¨rṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatēkrimi
Digital edition of SII 31.171 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
